name: N-(5-phosphonato-β-D-ribo… to 5-hydroxyisouric acid
summary: A 15-step route from N-(5-phosphonato-β-D-ribosyl)anthranilate to 5-hydroxyisouric acid, ingested from Rhea. Every step is curated by Rhea and independently verified here to balance in mass and charge.

reactions.name: thiazole synthase
reactions.equation: [ThiS sulfur-carrier protein]-C-terminal-Gly-aminoethanethioate + 2-iminoacetate + 1-deoxy-D-xylulose 5-phosphate = [ThiS sulfur-carrier protein]-C-terminal Gly-Gly + 2-[(2R,5Z)-2-carboxy-4-methylthiazol-5(2H)-ylidene]ethyl phosphate + 2 H2O + H(+)

reactions.name: sulfur carrier protein ThiS adenylyltransferase
reactions.equation: [ThiS sulfur-carrier protein]-C-terminal Gly-Gly + ATP + H(+) = [ThiS sulfur-carrier protein]-C-terminal Gly-Gly-AMP + diphosphate

reactions.name: [ThiS sulfur-carrier protein]-C-terminal Gly-Gly-AMP + S-sulfanyl-L-cysteinyl-[cysteine...
reactions.equation: [ThiS sulfur-carrier protein]-C-terminal Gly-Gly-AMP + S-sulfanyl-L-cysteinyl-[cysteine desulfurase] + AH2 = [ThiS sulfur-carrier protein]-C-terminal-Gly-aminoethanethioate + L-cysteinyl-[cysteine desulfurase] + A + AMP + 2 H(+)

reactions.name: molybdopterin synthase
reactions.equation: 2 [molybdopterin-synthase sulfur-carrier protein]-C-terminal-Gly-aminoethanethioate + cyclic pyranopterin phosphate + H2O = molybdopterin + 2 [molybdopterin-synthase sulfur-carrier protein]-C-terminal Gly-Gly + 2 H(+)

reactions.name: molybdenum cofactor cytidylyltransferase
reactions.equation: Mo-molybdopterin + CTP + H(+) = Mo-molybdopterin cytosine dinucleotide + diphosphate

reactions.name: urate + NADPH + O2 + H(+) = 5-hydroxyisourate + NADP(+) + H2O
reactions.equation: urate + NADPH + O2 + H(+) = 5-hydroxyisourate + NADP(+) + H2O

reactions.name: tRNA-5-methyluridine(54) 2-sulfurtransferase
reactions.equation: [TtuB sulfur-carrier protein]-C-terminal-Gly-aminoethanethioate + 5-methyluridine(54) in tRNA + ATP + H2O = [TtuB sulfur-carrier protein]-C-terminal Gly-Gly + 5-methyl-2-thiouridine(54) in tRNA + AMP + diphosphate + H(+)

reactions.name: [sulfur-carrier protein]-C-terminal Gly-Gly + hydrogen sulfide + ATP = [sulfur-carrier ...
reactions.equation: [sulfur-carrier protein]-C-terminal Gly-Gly + hydrogen sulfide + ATP = [sulfur-carrier protein]-C-terminal-Gly-aminoethanethioate + AMP + diphosphate

reactions.name: benzoyl-CoA reductase
reactions.equation: A + NH4(+) + 2 ADP + 2 phosphate + H(+) = hydroxylamine + AH2 + 2 ATP + H2O

reactions.name: adenylyl-molybdopterin + tungstate = W-molybdopterin cofactor + AMP + H(+)
reactions.equation: adenylyl-molybdopterin + tungstate = W-molybdopterin cofactor + AMP + H(+)

reactions.name: molybdenum cofactor sulfurtransferase
reactions.equation: Mo-molybdopterin + L-cysteine + AH2 = thio-Mo-molybdopterin + L-alanine + A + H2O

reactions.name: guanosine(34) in tRNA(Asp) + queuine = queuosine(34) in tRNA(Asp) + guanine
reactions.equation: guanosine(34) in tRNA(Asp) + queuine = queuosine(34) in tRNA(Asp) + guanine

reactions.name: L-histidyl-[ribosomal protein uL15] + 2-oxoglutarate + O2 = (3S)-3-hydroxy-L-histidyl-[...
reactions.equation: L-histidyl-[ribosomal protein uL15] + 2-oxoglutarate + O2 = (3S)-3-hydroxy-L-histidyl-[ribosomal protein uL15] + succinate + CO2

reactions.name: 5-methylcytidine(34) in mitochondrial tRNA(Met) + 2 2-oxoglutarate + 2 O2 = 5-formylcyt...
reactions.equation: 5-methylcytidine(34) in mitochondrial tRNA(Met) + 2 2-oxoglutarate + 2 O2 = 5-formylcytidine(34) in mitochondrial tRNA(Met) + 2 succinate + 2 CO2 + H2O
